observations.title: ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED 遷移は新設計で dead code になる
observations.rationale: coordinator が 'escalation' でなく 'approved' 相当を返すようになると、when: s => error.code === ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED の条件は永遠に発火しない。実装時に削除または保守注記を入れることを推奨する。

observations.title: applyRoundResults の allMembersSkipped ガードは新設計でも維持が必要
observations.rationale: 要件 5（skip が恒久 free-pass にならない）を満たすには、all-skip 時に members を 'pending' のままにする既存ガード (!allMembersSkipped) を roundError 廃止後も残す必要がある。

observations.title: 後方回復経路は commitRound の error: roundError 上書きで自然に成立する
observations.rationale: commitRound は常に error: roundError で state.error を上書きする。新設計で roundError=null を渡せば既存 job の sticky ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED も resume 時にクリアされ、終端 seam が発火しなくなる。実装上の追加対応は不要。

toolResult.reason:
Wrote design.md, spec.md, tasks.md under specrunner/changes/round-all-skip-pass-through/ on branch change/round-all-skip-pass-through-9141b6e6.

Change plan: reverse the `custom-reviewer-canon-binding` D6 decision (all-skip → escalation) so a round where every custom reviewer member skips (activation mismatch) becomes a structural skip that passes the gate green, while preserving canon binding (D1–D5/D7).

Decisions:
- D1: aggregateVerdict — remove the "non-empty all-skipped → escalation" branch so all-skip aggregates to approved (verdict vocabulary kept; per-member verdict stays "skipped"; escalation short-circuit + needs-fix priority unchanged).
- D2: parallel-review-round.ts — stop setting ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED roundError; roundError stays null, and commitRound's `state.error = roundError` clears any sticky error (basis for backward recovery, req 6). Keep the diag log.
- D3: keep the applyRoundResults-suppression guard so all-skip members stay "pending" (not finalized "skipped") — avoids permanent free-pass, re-evaluated each round (req 5).
- D4: pipeline.ts — delete the terminal-seam ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED → awaiting-resume branch (single awaiting-archive path).
- D5: reviewer-chain.ts — delete the coordinator escalation→regression-gate routing keyed on ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED; skip+error mixed rounds then fall to default escalate → awaiting-resume (req 3 preserved).
- D-journal: per-member skip evidence (step-attempt record + `<member>-skipped` transition, with skipReason) is already journaled via the members array → commitRound → store.persist; preserve it, no new event type (req 2).

Verified: executor activation gate (req 4) and canon binding are untouched. Documented test-impact list (reviewer-status.test.ts, parallel-review-round-canon.test.ts, reviewer-activation-e2e.test.ts) for implementation-notes and destruction-confirmation notes. Implementation is left to the downstream implementer per tasks.md.

observations.title: reviewer-chain.ts:439 の coordinator `on: 'skipped'` 遷移は D1 前後ともに到達不能
observations.rationale: aggregateVerdict の戻り値型は 'approved' | 'needs-fix' | 'escalation' であり 'skipped' を返さないため、当該遷移は現行コードでも dead code。D5 はこの行を除去しない設計だが、本 change 起因ではなく既存の状態。ブロッキングなし。

observations.title: T-06 journal 証跡テストで members push が allMembersSkipped guard と独立していることを実装者が確認すること
observations.rationale: allMembersSkipped guard は applyRoundResults のみを抑止し commitRound に渡す members 配列への push には影響しない（parallel-review-round.ts:317-334 と 468 はスコープが別）。T-06 の journal assertion がこれを固定するが、実装時に混同しないよう注意を促す情報事項。

message: spec-review iteration 1 completed with verdict: approved

toolResult.reason: test-cases.md を生成し worktree に書き出した。Scenario 由来 10 件（TC-001〜TC-010）は Source 参照のみ、非 Scenario 由来 9 件（TC-011〜TC-019）は GWT 付き。合計 19 件（must: 15, should: 4）、全自動化。

Test materialization complete. 4 files written. All 15 must TCs covered with TC ID in test function name or comment. 11 tests are intentionally RED (pending implementation), 56 pass.

RED tests (will go green after implementation):
- TC-003: aggregateVerdict(["skipped","skipped"]) → "approved" (reviewer-status.test.ts)
- TC-006(canon)/TC-038 x3: round outcome "approved", error null, single-member (parallel-review-round-canon.test.ts)
- TC-015: sticky ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED error cleared to null (parallel-review-round-canon.test.ts)
- TC-001/TC-ACT-01, TC-ACT-02 requestTypes, TC-002/TC-ACT-04: awaiting-archive after all-skip (reviewer-activation-e2e.test.ts)
- TC-010: backward recovery from ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED state (reviewer-activation-e2e.test.ts)
- TC-016: pipeline.ts has no ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED reference (static test)
- TC-017: reviewer-chain.ts has no ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED reference (static test)

GREEN tests (already pass, guarding existing/unchanged behavior):
- TC-004/TC-005: per-member skip evidence in state and events.jsonl journal
- TC-006 (new): skip+error mixed → escalation (error/skip distinction maintained)
- TC-007: aggregateVerdict(["skipped","escalation"]) → "escalation"
- TC-009: member status stays pending after all-skip (D3 guard maintained)
- TC-011-014 (should): various aggregateVerdict combinations
- TC-008/TC-018/TC-019: executor activation and canon binding regression tests (unmodified, passing)

Implemented all 4 production code changes: (T-01) aggregateVerdict in reviewer-status.ts now returns "approved" for all-skip (removed the non-empty-all-skipped→escalation branch, removed hasNonSkipped tracking, updated docstring); (T-02) parallel-review-round.ts no longer sets ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED roundError for all-skip—only keeps the logPipelineDiag call, updated all related comments; (T-03) pipeline.ts terminal seam now always routes to awaiting-archive for nextStep==="end", removed the ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED→awaiting-resume branch entirely; (T-04) reviewer-chain.ts buildParallelReviewerTransitions no longer pushes the conditional all-members-skipped escalation→regression-gate transition. typecheck passes and all 9374 tests pass (1 skipped).

findings.title: stale comment: ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED terminal seam は D4 で削除済み
findings.rationale: helpers.ts:122-124 の NOTE コメントは「pipeline.ts が sticky state.error で ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED を終端判定する」と説明しているが、D4 でその分岐を削除したため記述が stale になっている。pushStepResult 自体の sticky 挙動は正しいが、理由として挙げている ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED 検出はもはや存在しない。将来のメンテナーが旧挙動を復元する根拠として誤読するリスクがある。機能への影響なし。

findings.title: implementation-notes.md が存在しない（受け入れ基準で明示要求）
findings.rationale: request.md 受け入れ基準の最終項「更新対象を implementation-notes に列挙する」に対応するファイルが change folder に作成されていない。更新対象テストの一覧は design.md「テスト影響」節と各テストコードの CHANGE コメントに記載されており情報は揃っているが、独立アーティファクトとしての implementation-notes.md がない。機能・テストへの影響なし。

message: scale-tolerance skipped: no changed files matched paths [src/store/**, src/adapter/github/**, src/core/inbox/**, src/logger/**]

findings.title: Stale comment names removed ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED terminal invariant
findings.rationale: The NOTE comment at lines 122–126 of pushStepResult states: "pipeline.ts relies on this 'sticky' behaviour to detect ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED at the end-of-pipeline check". D4 of this change removes that terminal seam from pipeline.ts entirely. The sticky-error mechanism is no longer needed for this purpose, yet the comment names it as the rationale. TC-016 and TC-017 guard pipeline.ts and reviewer-chain.ts against the string reappearing, but helpers.ts is outside those checks. A future maintainer reading only helpers.ts could (1) believe ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED detection still exists in pipeline.ts and work around it, (2) misread TC-016 as conflicting with the 'intentional' claim, or (3) restore the terminal check thinking the comment demands it. Fix: remove the ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED rationale from the NOTE — the sticky behavior's only documented use case is gone.

observations.title: allMembersSkipped guard correctly survives inspectionEscalated co-occurrence
observations.rationale: When the HEAD guard (step 5b) fires and also all members returned skipped, inspectionEscalated=true + allMembersSkipped=true: aggregateVerdictResult stays 'escalation' (step 7 is skipped), applyRoundResults is not called (both flags block it), roundError is ROUND_HEAD_ADVANCED (not null). The pipeline halts correctly. This double-guard interaction is not explicitly tested but is structurally sound.

observations.title: TC-010 simulates post-resume state directly, does not exercise actual resume.ts flow
observations.rationale: TC-010 seeds a state with status='running' and error=null (simulating the result of resume.ts transitionJob call) and calls pipeline.run directly. The actual resume.ts path (transitionJob → persist → pipeline.run from resumePoint) is not traced. Functional coverage is adequate for the structural skip path, but the real resume command flow is exercised only end-to-end, not in unit scope.
